$meta.title: Linkedist Instagram Carousel — Reference Design Audit
$meta.subject: @linkedist 4-slide case study carousel (Gamification, How Linkedist gamified content with Shield)
$meta.audit_method: Pixel sampling of native 1080x1350 source PNGs via PIL, colour cluster analysis, bounding-box measurement

audit_confidence.colour: very high — sampled directly from source pixels
audit_confidence.spacing: high — measured from element bounding boxes
audit_confidence.typography: medium — font family inferred from visual characteristics, sizes measured from bbox
audit_confidence.imagery: high — treatment and composition observed directly

deliberate_omissions: Font families are best-guess from visual inspection; exact licensed fonts cannot be confirmed without metadata access
Line-height values are estimates within plausible typographic range
Photographic asset sourcing not catalogued (treatment described, source not identified)

background_soft.usage: anti-aliased neighbour to F9F9F9; treat as same token in design

dot_grid.usage: background dotted grid pattern, every slide

text_primary.usage: headlines, wordmark, body type on light backgrounds

blue_signal.usage: primary brand accent — result cards on slide 3, quote mark and emphasis text on slide 4

yellow_star.usage: decorative star icons inside CRT monitor screen, slide 1 only

greyscale_terrain.usage: mountain/grass landscape photography on slides 1 and 3, CRT monitor housing on slide 1

canvas_margin_safe.note: Wordmark sits at left edge x=95 and top y=91, measured from native 1080x1350

grid.system: implicit symmetric, no visible column rails

background_pattern.alignment: edge-to-edge full bleed, dots continue beneath all foreground elements

footer_band.contains: category-tag pill left, slide-counter pill right

display.best_free_substitute: Inter Tight Bold (Google Fonts) or Space Grotesk Bold
display.characteristics: geometric sans, true-circle 'o', single-storey 'a', mechanical proportions, generous x-height, very tight tracking

display_xl.usage: slide 1 hook headline, slide 4 quote payoff

display_lg.usage: slide 2 'Actions taken:' and slide 3 'Results achieved:' section heads

stat_xl.usage: slide 3 oversized number value inside blue cards (e.g. '30-90k', '1x/week to 2x/week', '11')

stat_caption.usage: slide 3 supporting label text under stats

podium_ghost_numeral.usage: slide 3 large 1, 2, 3 ghost numerals behind cards

ui_label.usage: category tag and slide counter pills, wordmark

header_wordmark.note: On slide 4 the wordmark is centred horizontally (x=472-607); on slides 1-3 it is left-aligned. Deliberate variation on the closing slide.

swipe_indicator_pill.note: Functions as a swipe-affordance cue; intentionally removed on final slide to signal carousel end

card_neutral_2up_2x2.type: rounded white card with image and caption

card.shadow: subtle drop shadow, very low opacity, blur ~24px, y-offset ~4px

card_neutral_2up_2x2.image_treatment: object-fit contain, photographic or mocked UI vector, no border

card_accent_stat_podium.type: rounded blue card displaying a single stat
card_accent_stat_podium.arrangement: 3 cards on imagined podium with varied heights — centre card tallest (1st place), left card medium (2nd), right card shortest (3rd)

podium_ghost_numerals.usage: slide 3 only, behind blue stat cards
podium_ghost_numerals.arrangement: horizontal row matching card podium positions

quote_payoff_block.type: centred display quote with leading quotation mark glyph

quote_mark.position: centred above text, ~120px above first line of body

body.emphasis_pattern: final phrase (e.g. 'a little healthy competition') receives accent colour while preceding text remains black

treatment_principles.photographic_palette: desaturated to pure greyscale, low-to-mid contrast, soft texture retained
treatment_principles.subject_matter: physical, tactile, organic forms (grass, mountains, weathered hardware) used as visual counterweight to the otherwise flat geometric design system
treatment_principles.integration: photographic elements are placed as full-bleed environmental layers (slide 1, 3) or as small product-mock thumbnails inside cards (slide 2)
treatment_principles.noise_layer: CRT-monitor interior on slide 1 carries an intentional analogue noise texture, signalling the slightly nostalgic / lo-fi tone of the gamification theme

slide_1.primary: vintage beige CRT monitor with keyboard sitting on grass-textured greyscale mountain
slide_1.inside_screen: static noise + black shield logo + three yellow stars beneath logo
slide_1.function: metaphor — gamified content literalised as classic arcade-rating UI

slide_2.primary: four card thumbnails showing UI screenshots: (1) Olympics challenge cards, (2) laptop with dashboard, (3) content idea bank UI, (4) Slack app with logo overlay

slide_3.primary: greyscale mountain/grass terrain occupying lower third as a visual baseline beneath the podium of blue stat cards
slide_3.function: grounds the data podium in the established earthy visual language

slide_4.primary: no photographic asset — pure typographic close
slide_4.function: the payoff line stands alone; absence of imagery is itself a design choice signalling this is the conclusion

narrative_architecture.carousel_arc: Case-study quartet: hook then mechanism then outcome then insight

slide_1_role.label: Curiosity hook
slide_1_role.device: Provocative question paired with metaphorical hero visual
slide_1_role.swipe_motivation: Reader wants the answer to the posed question

slide_2_role.label: Mechanism reveal
slide_2_role.device: Heading 'Actions taken:' plus 2x2 categorised grid of interventions
slide_2_role.swipe_motivation: Reader wants to see whether the actions worked

slide_3_role.label: Proof and outcome
slide_3_role.device: Heading 'Results achieved:' plus 3-card podium of headline numbers; accent colour finally introduced to mark the payoff zone
slide_3_role.swipe_motivation: Reader wants the takeaway and the one-line lesson

slide_4_role.label: Insight and payoff line
slide_4_role.device: Pure typographic quote, final emphasis in accent colour, no swipe indicator, centred wordmark
slide_4_role.function: Memorable, screenshot-ready closing thought; designed to be saved or shared

narrative_architecture.pacing_principle: Information density rises through slides 1 to 3 then collapses to a single sentence on slide 4. Visual complexity follows the same arc: dense (1) then grid (2) then focal (3) then minimal (4).

what_makes_this_visually_distinctive: Dot-grid background as constant texture across every slide; unifies the system without competing for attention
Hard discipline of black plus warm off-white as the base, with a single saturated blue accent introduced only at the proof and payoff slides
Greyscale photographic world (mountains, vintage hardware) as a tactile counterweight to the otherwise flat vector design
Pill components (swipe cue, category, counter) as persistent system furniture, same shape and stroke weight, no variation
Display type is tight, geometric, and slightly oversized; type IS the design on slides 1 and 4
Accent colour is rationed; appearing in only 2 of 4 slides makes it feel earned rather than decorative

ratios_to_replicate.title_to_canvas: headline occupies roughly 35-40% of canvas height on slide 1
ratios_to_replicate.card_to_canvas: each 2x2 card occupies ~40% width and ~32% height of canvas on slide 2
ratios_to_replicate.podium_card_heights: centre card ~120%, left card ~85%, right card ~75%; establishes hierarchy
ratios_to_replicate.negative_space: approximately 55-60% of every slide is empty background; whitespace IS the content
